findings.description: `ClasspathResourceLoader` is used in the s2 Java code example (`ClasspathResourceLoader.class.getName()`) but is absent from s2 hints. It only appears in s3 hints. Users asking about VelocityEngine setup or resource loading configuration would benefit from this hint being in s2.

The comment `//必要に応じてVelocityEngineへその他の設定を行う` is omitted from the extracted Java code. This comment informs developers that the shown configuration is minimal and additional VelocityEngine settings should be added as required, which is relevant implementation guidance.
findings.source_evidence: Source code block between `setProperty` calls and `velocityEngine.init()`: `//必要に応じてVelocityEngineへその他の設定を行う`
